# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pull requests and includes the PR title and description in build notifications. Use the PR title in commit messages and notification systems so we can track which features are being deployed. This helps with our release notes automation.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build on Pull Request

on:
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - name: Check out code
      uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Display PR title and description
      run: echo "PR Title: ${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}"; echo "PR Description: ${{ github.event.pull_request.body }}"

    - name: Use PR title in commit message
      run: |
        git config user.name "GitHub Actions"
        git config user.email "<>"
        git fetch
        git merge FETCH_HEAD --no-ff --no-commit
        git commit -am "${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}"
        git push

    - name: Send notification with PR title
      run: echo "::set-env name=PR_TITLE::${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}"
      
  notify:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: success()

    steps:
    - name: Display notification
      run: echo "Feature Deployed: ${{ env.PR_TITLE }}"
